title: rhododendron rex subsp. fictolacteum
intro: Rhododendron rex subsp. fictolacteum, also known as the Madeira rhododendron, is a subspecies of rhododendron native to the island of Madeira in Portugal. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron rex subsp. fictolacteum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
